name: Exposure of Resource to Wrong Sphere
description: The product exposes a resource to the wrong control sphere, making it accessible to actors outside the intended access boundary through insufficient permission restrictions or incorrect resource targeting in program logic.
detection_pattern: STORAGE or STRUCTURAL node containing a protected resource (file, directory, database, API endpoint) is accessible via an EGRESS or EXTERNAL path without passing through an AUTH or CONTROL[access_control] node that enforces proper sphere boundaries and permission checks
